##NAMES=Carpathite
##RRUFFID=R060660
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=C_24_H_12_
##LOCALITY=Prospect 500 meters north of Picachos mine, south of New Idria, San Benito County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of light tan colored platy crystals

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
